title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript with FIVE simulation engines: state-vector, density-matrix, stabilizer-tableau (Clifford circuits to 30 qubits), a Matrix Product State tensor network with a from-scratch complex SVD, and an exact free-fermion (Jordan‚ÄìWigner + Bogoliubov) solver for the transverse-field Ising chain ‚Äî running arbitrary circuits on 40 qubits in O(n¬∑œá¬≤) memory with error-tracked bond truncation, perfect sampling and per-cut entanglement entropy. On top of the tensor network: TEBD real-time dynamics of the Ising chain (quench light-cone, matched to exact), and full two-site DMRG ‚Äî Matrix Product Operators + incremental environments + a matrix-free Lanczos eigensolver finding the ground state of the Ising and Heisenberg/XXZ chains, matching exact diagonalisation to ~1e-13 with a vanishing ‚ü®H¬≤‚ü©‚àí‚ü®H‚ü©¬≤ eigenstate certificate at lengths far past exact diag, plus a phase-transition scan that locates quantum critical points from the ground-state entanglement peak. And now TOPOLOGICAL ERROR CORRECTION: the rotated surface code [[d¬≤,1,d]] with a real Minimum-Weight Perfect Matching decoder ‚Äî a faithful from-scratch implementation of Edmonds' blossom algorithm (Galil's O(V¬≥) primal-dual matching, verified against brute force) running on a graph of lit-up parity checks weighted by lattice distance. Inject X/Z errors on an interactive lattice and watch the checks fire, the matching form, and the residual be classified as a stabilizer or a logical failure; a Monte-Carlo sweep reproduces the ‚âà10.3% error-correction threshold where the distance-3/5/7 curves cross. And now FAULT TOLERANCE IN SPACE-TIME: a phenomenological noise model with T repeated noisy syndrome rounds decoded on a 3-D space-time matching graph (time edges absorb measurement errors), a from-scratch Union-Find decoder (Delfosse‚ÄìNivelle: near-linear cluster growth + peeling, cross-checked against MWPM), the phenomenological threshold (~3%), and finite-size scaling ‚Äî the Œõ = p_L(d)/p_L(d+2) suppression factor plus a universal data collapse that fits (p_th, ŒΩ). And now AN EXACT FREE-FERMION ENGINE: the transverse-field Ising chain is secretly free, so the Jordan‚ÄìWigner transform + a Bogoliubov‚Äìde Gennes diagonalisation (which is literally a singular-value decomposition of an n√ón matrix, reusing the same from-scratch complex SVD) solve it EXACTLY in O(n¬≥) at hundreds of sites the 2‚Åø vector cannot hold and DMRG only approximates ‚Äî an exact oracle that reproduces the lab's own TFIM ground energy from exact diagonalisation to machine precision and then runs far past it. It gives the Bogoliubov spectrum and ground energy E‚ÇÄ=‚àí¬ΩŒ£Œõ_k, the quasiparticle gap 2|J‚àíh| closing at the quantum critical point h=J, block entanglement from the ground state's MAJORANA COVARIANCE matrix (Peschel) that recovers the Ising-CFT central charge c=¬Ω via a Calabrese‚ÄìCardy fit, a ground energy per site matching the closed-form Pfeuty thermodynamic integral, and an exact real-time QUENCH whose Gaussian correlation matrices evolve in O(n¬≥) per step ‚Äî reproducing the entanglement light-cone at sizes whose Schmidt rank 2^S no MPS or exact simulator could store, every small-n step cross-checked against exact dense evolution. And now DYNAMICAL QUANTUM PHASE TRANSITIONS: the engine, generalised to the anisotropic XY chain (the Ising point is Œ≥=1) and solved in momentum space with periodic boundaries, makes the headline non-equilibrium effect of the decade exactly tractable ‚Äî quench across the critical point and the Loschmidt return-rate function l(t)=‚àílim(1/N)ln|‚ü®œà‚ÇÄ|e^{‚àíiH_f t}|œà‚ÇÄ‚ü©|¬≤ develops non-analytic CUSPS in real time (Heyl‚ÄìPolkovnikov‚ÄìKehrein) at the critical times t‚Çô*=(2n+1)œÄ/Œµ‚Çñ*, with an integer DYNAMICAL TOPOLOGICAL ORDER PARAMETER ŒΩ_D(t) (the Pancharatnam geometric-phase winding, Budich‚ÄìHeyl) that is 0 before the first cusp and jumps by exactly +1 at each ‚Äî both cross-checked to ~1e-14 against an independent dense 2‚Åø time evolution ‚Äî plus the XY phase diagram and the exact mutual information between disjoint blocks. And now SHOR'S ALGORITHM: integer factoring by quantum order-finding, built from scratch end to end ‚Äî to factor N, find the period r of x ‚Ü¶ a¬∑x mod N by phase-estimating the eigenphase s/r of the modular-multiplication unitary, then recover r with a continued fraction so gcd(a^(r/2)¬±1, N) are real factors. Two independent quantum circuits (a full (n+t)-qubit register with controlled modular multipliers + an inverse QFT, and the hardware-friendly iterative one-ancilla variant with classical feedback) are graded against an exact closed-form Dirichlet-kernel distribution to machine precision, and the Shor tab actually factors 15, 21, 33, 35‚Ä¶ live with an order-finding spectrum, the continued-fraction reconstruction, and a factor tree. And now THE ONE-WAY QUANTUM COMPUTER: measurement-based quantum computation built from scratch ‚Äî no gates, just a fixed entangled CLUSTER STATE measured qubit-by-qubit in adaptive single-qubit bases. A faithful measurement calculus (Danos‚ÄìKashefi‚ÄìPanangaden: N/E/M commands with feed-forward angles œÜ=(‚àí1)^{sX}Œ±+sZœÄ) and a universal {J(Œ±),CZ} compiler turn any single-qubit unitary (via its Euler angles) and CNOT into a cluster + measurement schedule, propagating the Pauli byproduct operators symbolically; a dynamic state-vector engine frees every qubit the instant it is measured, so a computation of any depth keeps a live register no bigger than the number of logical wires (a deep two-wire circuit spreads across dozens of physical qubits but never holds more than three). The headline ‚Äî determinism from randomness ‚Äî is verified to machine precision: every run records different measurement outcomes, yet undoing the known byproduct frame yields a byte-for-byte identical logical state, cross-checked against an independent dense circuit-model oracle over hundreds of random inputs and outcome strings; cluster states are shown to be the graph states stabilised by K_v=X_v‚àèZ_w. And now FAULT-TOLERANT UNIVERSALITY ‚Äî the two ideas that let a Clifford-only machine run an arbitrary computation. THE SOLOVAY‚ÄìKITAEV ALGORITHM compiles any single-qubit gate into a word over the discrete fault-tolerant set {H,T,T‚ÄÝ,S,S‚ÄÝ,X,Y,Z} to precision Œµ in O(log^c(1/Œµ)) gates: a precomputed Œµ‚ÇÄ-net of short words seeds a recursion that writes the leftover error as a balanced GROUP COMMUTATOR Œî=VWV‚ÄÝW‚ÄÝ (the Dawson‚ÄìNielsen construction, axis‚Äìangle algebra only, no eigensolver) whose factors are ‚àö-closer to the identity, so the error contracts super-linearly Œµ_n‚âàc¬∑Œµ_{n‚àí1}^{3/2} and depth 3‚Äì5 reaches 10‚Åª¬≥‚Äì10‚Åª‚Å∂ ‚Äî every compiled word is multiplied back out in genuine U(2) to confirm it reproduces the target up to global phase, with the all-important T-count reported. MAGIC-STATE DISTILLATION then manufactures the non-Clifford T gates SK consumes: the Bravyi‚ÄìKitaev 15-to-1 routine on the [[15,1,3]] Reed‚ÄìMuller code, whose error analysis reduces exactly to the classical [15,11,3] Hamming code ‚Äî post-select on a trivial X-syndrome, fail only on an odd-weight codeword, and because the code has distance 3 with exactly 35 weight-3 logicals the output obeys the cubic law p_out=35p¬≥ below a threshold p*‚âà14.2%, so cascading drives the error to zero doubly-exponentially; the exact code enumeration is cross-checked against a Monte-Carlo of the post-selected protocol. And now TWO-QUBIT GATE SYNTHESIS ‚Äî the two-qubit dual of Solovay‚ÄìKitaev. A real machine has only single-qubit rotations and ONE entangler (the CNOT), so the KAK (CARTAN) DECOMPOSITION of SU(4), built from scratch, lowers any two-qubit gate onto that basis: every gate factors as U=e^{iœÜ}(A‚ÇÄ‚äóA‚ÇÅ)¬∑exp(i(cx XX+cy YY+cz ZZ))¬∑(B‚ÇÄ‚äóB‚ÇÅ), recovered by the magic-basis trick (Kraus‚ÄìCirac/Makhlin) ‚Äî in the Bell basis a single-qubit pair becomes a real orthogonal matrix and the interaction becomes diagonal, so ≈®=O‚ÇÅFO‚ÇÇ is extracted by a real SIMULTANEOUS DIAGONALISATION of the commuting real and imaginary parts of ≈®≈®·µÄ, robust even through the degenerate spectra of CNOT and iSWAP. The three numbers (cx,cy,cz) are a COMPLETE LOCAL INVARIANT living in the WEYL CHAMBER, and they dictate the geometric MINIMUM CNOT COUNT (0 local ¬∑ 1 the CNOT corner ¬∑ 2 the cz=0 face ‚Äî iSWAP/‚àöiSWAP/the Berkeley B gate ¬∑ 3 the interior ‚Äî SWAP/‚àöSWAP/a generic gate); the canonical interaction is realised by the optimal three-CNOT Vatan‚ÄìWilliams circuit whose angles read straight off the coordinates, synthesising any gate into {Rz,Ry,CNOT} to ~1e-12. Then the loop closes: every single-qubit gate is compiled by Solovay‚ÄìKitaev into a {H,T} word, so an arbitrary two-qubit gate becomes a fault-tolerant {H,T,CNOT} circuit with a total T-count ‚Äî the magic-state budget. The 2-Qubit Synthesis tab decomposes CNOT/CZ/iSWAP/‚àöiSWAP/‚àöSWAP/B/SWAP/random SU(4), plots the gate's address in the Weyl-chamber tetrahedron, shows the Makhlin local invariants G‚ÇÅ,G‚ÇÇ (CNOT (0,1), iSWAP (0,‚àí1), SWAP (‚àí1,‚àí3)), draws the synthesised circuit, and compiles the fault-tolerant version live. And now n-QUBIT GATE SYNTHESIS ‚Äî the QUANTUM SHANNON DECOMPOSITION (Shende‚ÄìBullock‚ÄìMarkov), the n-qubit generalisation of the 1- and 2-qubit synthesis, built from scratch. Its structure theorem is the COSINE‚ÄìSINE DECOMPOSITION: partition a 2‚Åø√ó2‚Åø unitary by its top qubit into four 2‚Åø‚Åª¬π blocks and it factors as U=diag(L0,L1)¬∑[[C,‚àíS],[S,C]]¬∑diag(R0‚ÄÝ,R1‚ÄÝ) ‚Äî two block-diagonal quantum multiplexors around a central [[C,‚àíS],[S,C]] that is exactly a uniformly-controlled R è (C=cos Œ∏, S=sin Œ∏), recovered from two block SVDs (Hermitian eig of the Gram matrix) plus an orthonormal completion, with cos¬≤+sin¬≤=1 and unitary blocks. Each multiplexor diag(A,B) then DEMULTIPLEXES as (I‚äóV)¬∑(uniformly-controlled R_z)¬∑(I‚äóW) via the EIGENDECOMPOSITION OF THE UNITARY A¬∑B‚ÄÝ ‚Äî new machinery built by simultaneously diagonalising its two commuting Hermitian parts (W+W‚ÄÝ)/2 and (W‚àíW‚ÄÝ)/2i, robust through the repeated eigenvalues of structured gates ‚Äî leaving two (n‚àí1)-qubit gates to RECURSE on plus three uniformly-controlled rotations, each lowered to the optimal 2‚Åø‚Åª¬π CNOTs by the Gray-code/Walsh‚ÄìHadamard angle transform (M√∂tt√∂nen). The base case is the 1-qubit ZYZ. The whole synthesis reproduces ANY gate to machine precision (~1e-11 at 5 qubits) at exactly (¬æ)¬∑4‚Åø‚àí3¬∑2‚Åø‚Åª¬π CNOTs ‚Äî 6/36/168/720 for n=2‚Ä¶5 ‚Äî while a peephole optimiser (adjacent-CNOT cancellation + rotation fusion) collapses structured gates (QFT, Toffoli, Fredkin, Grover diffusion, modular adders) far below that bound, a generic Haar SU(2‚Åø) sitting exactly on it. The n-Qubit Synthesis tab draws the {Rz,Ry,CNOT} circuit, the per-level recursion summing to the closed form, the ¬æ¬∑4‚Åø cost curve with the gate marked, and ‚Äî closing the loop with Solovay‚ÄìKitaev ‚Äî the fault-tolerant {H,T,CNOT} compile with a total T-count, the magic-state bill of universality. And now DEVICE-INDEPENDENT QUANTUM INFORMATION: the pillar that turns nonlocality into a resource and a security primitive ‚Äî trust NOTHING about the boxes' internal physics, only the observed statistics. Its centrepiece is a from-scratch SEMIDEFINITE-PROGRAMMING solver (Burer‚ÄìMonteiro low-rank primal over the elliptope + an eigenvalue-penalised dual, both on the lab's own Jacobi eigensolver), with which the NAVASCU√âS‚ÄìPIRONIO‚ÄìAC√çN hierarchy (level 1) computes Tsirelson's bound S ‚â§ 2‚àö2 as a CERTIFIED CEILING ‚Äî the moment matrix Œì of operator inner products is necessarily PSD, so maximising the Bell functional over Œì ‚™∞ 0, diag = 1 upper-bounds EVERY quantum strategy in any dimension (where the earlier Monte-Carlo only sampled qubit strategies, this proves the ceiling), primal and dual meeting at 2‚àö2 with a ~1e-8 duality gap. An independent OPERATOR SUM-OF-SQUARES certificate 2‚àö2¬∑I ‚àí S = (1/‚àö2)(u¬≤+v¬≤) is verified to be the exact zero matrix ‚Äî a second, basis-independent proof needing no numerics. Then the consequences: DEVICE-INDEPENDENT RANDOMNESS (an observed S certifies P_guess = ¬Ω + ¬Ω‚àö(2‚àíS¬≤/4) against any adversary who built the devices, so the min-entropy climbs from 0 bits at S=2 to 1 full bit at 2‚àö2); EPR STEERING, the asymmetric middle of the hierarchy, with the steering ellipsoid (Jevtic et al.) drawn live and the CJWR inequalities S_n=(1/‚àön)|Œ£‚ü®A‚ÇñB‚Çñ‚ü©|‚â§1 violated up to S‚ÇÇ=‚àö2, S‚ÇÉ=‚àö3 with the Werner critical visibility w>1/‚àön; the DETECTION LOOPHOLE, where the maximally-entangled CH threshold Œ∑>2(‚àö2‚àí1)‚âà82.8% drops toward Eberhard's Œ∑>2/3 for non-maximally-entangled states (minimising Œ∑*=M/Q over the measurements); and the POPESCU‚ÄìROHRLICH box, the no-signalling correlation reaching the algebraic maximum S=4, placing quantum theory's 2‚àö2 strictly between the local 2 and what causality alone allows. And now QUANTUM METROLOGY ‚Äî the third great application of entanglement (sensing), built from scratch. A phase Œ∏ imprinted by U(Œ∏)=e^{‚àíiŒ∏G} obeys the QUANTUM CRAM√âR‚ÄìRAO BOUND ŒîŒ∏ ‚â• 1/‚àö(ŒΩ¬∑F_Q), where the QUANTUM FISHER INFORMATION F_Q is the most information any measurement could extract: for a pure probe F_Q=4¬∑Var(G), and on the collective generator G=J_z=¬ΩŒ£Z·µ¢ every number is an exact rational. N independent |+‚ü© probes give the STANDARD QUANTUM LIMIT F_Q=N (ŒîŒ∏‚àù1/‚àöN); the N-qubit GHZ cat gives the HEISENBERG LIMIT F_Q=N¬≤ (ŒîŒ∏‚àù1/N) ‚Äî a genuine ‚àöN advantage, the principle behind squeezed-light interferometry and atomic clocks. The open-system case uses the SLD formula F_Q=2Œ£|‚ü®i|‚àÇ_Œ∏œÅ|j‚ü©|¬≤/(Œª·µ¢+Œª‚±º) on an eigendecomposition of œÅ, verified to reduce to 4¬∑Var(G) on pure states; the bound is shown ATTAINABLE ‚Äî the parity readout X^‚äóN saturates F_C=N¬≤=F_Q at every phase while the generator-basis readout Z^‚äóN extracts F_C=0, with F_C‚â§F_Q everywhere. The punchline is fragility: under dephasing Œª the cat's global coherence decays as (1‚àíŒª)^N, so F_Q(GHZ)=N¬≤(1‚àíŒª)^N rises then collapses below F_Q(product)=N(1‚àíŒª) past a critical N ‚Äî the Huelga et al. result that erases the Heisenberg advantage under Markovian noise ‚Äî so the lab also builds the robust alternative real clocks use: SPIN SQUEEZING via the Kitagawa‚ÄìUeda one-axis-twisting Hamiltonian H=œá¬∑J_z¬≤ on a coherent spin state, the collective spin covariance and the WINELAND parameter Œæ¬≤_R=N¬∑(ŒîJ‚ä•min)¬≤/|‚ü®J‚ü©|¬≤ (with a Husimi-Q quasiprobability that shows the noise blob shear), conserving the Casimir ‚ü®J¬≤‚ü©=(N/2)(N/2+1), giving sub-SQL Œæ¬≤<1 bounded by 1/Œæ¬≤‚â§N and deepening as Œæ¬≤‚àùN^‚àí2/3. Also: Kraus noise, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, Schmidt decomposition, error-correcting codes (bit/phase-flip, 9-qubit Shor, Steane [[7,1,3]] with live syndrome decoding), phase estimation, VQE with analytic parameter-shift gradients & QAOA, randomized benchmarking, OpenQASM export. And now CLASSICAL SHADOWS ‚Äî randomized-measurement tomography (Huang‚ÄìKueng‚ÄìPreskill), the modern answer to learning a state you can only measure: a random unitary turns measurement into a known invertible channel M(œÅ)=E[U‚ÄÝ|b‚ü©‚ü®b|U], so ONE shot yields an unbiased classical snapshot œÅÃÇ=M‚Åª¬π(U‚ÄÝ|b‚ü©‚ü®b|U) with E[œÅÃÇ]=œÅ, and averaging tr(O œÅÃÇ) predicts ANY observable asked for afterwards ‚Äî one dataset, many predictions, with log(M)/Œµ¬≤ sample complexity. Both canonical ensembles are built from scratch: the RANDOM-PAULI (local) ensemble whose inverse factorises to œÉÃÇ=3|s‚ü©‚ü®s|‚àíI so a weight-k Pauli is read off in O(k) with single-shot variance exactly 3·µè (the shadow norm), and the RANDOM-CLIFFORD (global) ensemble œÅÃÇ=(2‚Åø+1)U‚ÄÝ|b‚ü©‚ü®b|U‚àíI whose variance is independent of locality, drawn from the FULLY ENUMERATED Clifford group (24 for n=1, 11520 for n=2 ‚Äî an exact unitary 3-design, so the estimator is exact). On top: simultaneous estimation of many observables from one shadow, the robust median-of-means aggregator, the purity Tr(œÅ¬≤) and 2-R√©nyi entanglement entropy via a snapshot-pair U-statistic (entropy from randomized measurements alone), and pure-state fidelity ‚Äî every functional cross-checked against the exact state vector, the unbiasedness E[œÅÃÇ]=œÅ proven DETERMINISTICALLY by enumerating the whole measurement ensemble to ~1e-15 (not merely sampled), and the error falling as 1/‚àöM live in the Shadows tab. And now QUANTUM WALKS ‚Äî the ballistic engine behind a family of quantum algorithms, both canonical models built from scratch. A classical random walker diffuses (œÉ ‚àù ‚àöt); a quantum walker rides coherent interference and spreads BALLISTICALLY (œÉ ‚àù t) ‚Äî the quadratic head start behind Grover-as-a-walk and element distinctness. The DISCRETE-TIME COINED walk pairs a position register with a coin qubit (Hadamard / symmetric-Y / biased coins); flip-then-shift iterates into the unmistakable two-horned distribution whose width grows as œÉ ‚âà ‚àö(1‚àí1/‚àö2)¬∑t ‚âà 0.5412 t, drawn over a space-time light cone and against the exact classical binomial (verified to the 0.5412 constant and an exactly symmetric distribution). The CONTINUOUS-TIME walk drops the coin: the graph adjacency matrix IS the Hamiltonian, so the walker evolves by e^{‚àíiAt}, computed EXACTLY by diagonalising it with the lab's own Hermitian Jacobi eigensolver ‚Äî giving PERFECT STATE TRANSFER between antipodal hypercube corners at t = œÄ/2 (|amp|¬≤=1 to ~1e-15), the time-averaged limiting distribution, and a quantum-vs-classical heat-kernel (e^{‚àíLt}) transport overlay on paths, cycles, complete/star graphs, hypercubes and grids ‚Äî the K_n transition matching the closed form 4¬∑sin¬≤(Nt/2)/N¬≤ and P‚ÇÇ reproducing sin¬≤t to machine precision. Promoted with a marked-vertex well, H = ‚àíŒ≥A ‚àí |w‚ü©‚ü®w| becomes CHILDS‚ÄìGOLDSTONE SPATIAL SEARCH: from the uniform start the amplitude rushes onto the marked vertex of K_N, hitting success ‚Üí 1 at t ‚âà (œÄ/2)‚àöN ‚Äî Grover's O(‚àöN) in continuous time ‚Äî a resonance that only fires near the critical Œ≥ = 1/N, located live by a Œ≥-scan. Plus a 186-case self-test suite cross-checking every engine against exact references.
